secretsmanager.secret.replicaregion.CfnA: A custom type that specifies a `Region` and the `KmsKeyId` for a replica secret.

secretsmanager.secret.replicaregion.KmsK.Description: The ARN, key ID, or alias of the KMS key to encrypt the secret. If you don't include this field, Secrets Manager uses `aws/secretsmanager`.

secretsmanager.secret.replicaregion.Regi.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.
